zh.lifeSummary: 當Abraham Sands於1613年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞吉爾德福德時，他的父親Abraham Sands29歲，母親Ann Caplin29歲。他於1631年5月30日與Ann Susanna Kirbie在英國英格蘭素瑞吉爾德福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1650年在英國英格蘭素可易亞斯特 古爾德福德享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abraham Sands于1613年出生在英国英格兰素瑞吉爾德福德时，他的父亲Abraham Sands29岁，母亲Ann Caplin29岁。他于1631年5月30日与Ann Susanna Kirbie在英国英格兰素瑞吉爾德福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1650年在英国英格兰素可易亞斯特 古爾德福德享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sands
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

variants.name: Sand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Ejnar, Lars, Levinus, Nels, Niels, Thor.

English, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a patch of sandy soil, from the vocabulary word sand (German Sand). As a Swedish name it was often purely ornamental, and as a Jewish artificial. It is also found in France (see 3 below).
English: habitational name from a place such as Send (Surrey) or Sound (Cheshire), named with Middle English sand, sond ‘sand’.

variants.name: Sandes
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

nameMeanings.name: Abraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the first of the Jewish patriarchs, with whom God made a covenant that his descendants should possess the land of Canaan. The Hebrew form is Avraham, and is of uncertain derivation. In Genesis 17:5 it is explained as ‘father of a multitude (of nations)’ (Hebrew av hamon (goyim). It has always been a popular Jewish given name, and was also chosen by Christians, especially by Puritans and other fundamentalists from the 16th century onwards. Various early saints of the Eastern Roman Empire also bore this name. Its currency in the United States was greatly enhanced by the fame of President Abraham Lincoln ( 1809–65 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Abraham Sands was born in 1613, in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Abraham Sands, was 29 and his mother, Ann Caplin, was 29. He married Ann Susanna Kirbie on 30 May 1631, in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died about 1650, in East Guldeford, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abraham Sands est né en 1613, à Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Abraham Sands, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ann Caplin, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ann Susanna Kirbie le 30 mai 1631, à Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 1650, à East Guldeford, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abraham Sands 1613 in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Abraham Sands 29 und seine Mutter Ann Caplin 29. Er hat am 30. Mai 1631 in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Ann Susanna Kirbie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um 1650 im Alter von 38 Jahren in East Guldeford, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Ann Susanna Kirbie il 30 maggio 1631, nel Guildford, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Abraham Sandsが1613年にイギリスイギリススリーグイルドフォードで生まれた時，父Abraham Sandsは29歳，母Ann Caplinは29歳であった。1631年5月30日にイギリスイギリススリーグイルドフォードでAnn Susanna Kirbieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1650年にイギリスイギリススセックスエアスト グルデフォードで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Abraham Sands(이)가 1613년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 길드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Abraham Sands(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Caplin(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1631년 5월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 길드퍼드에서 Ann Susanna Kirbie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1650년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 이스트 구데퍼드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abraham Sands родился в 1613 г. в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Abraham Sands было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Caplin, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Susanna Kirbie 30 мая 1631 г. в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер около 1650 г. в местности эаст гулдефорд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
